name: main_application
title: Welcome to PDF Utility
description: Introduction to the main application interface and key features

steps.text:
🎉 Welcome to PDF Utility!

This is your main workspace with different tabs for various PDF operations. Each tab provides specialized tools for different tasks.

💡 Click any tab to explore different PDF tools!

🔧 Menu Bar - Your Control Center

The menu bar contains all application functions:
• File: Open, save, and manage files
• Tools: Settings, tutorials, and utilities
• Help: Documentation and support

💡 Everything you need is organized here!

📊 Status Bar - Stay Informed

The status bar shows:
• Current operation progress
• Processing status and results
• Auto-import monitoring (when enabled)
• Helpful tips and notifications

⚙️ Settings & Configuration

Access important settings through Tools → Settings:
• Configure default save directories
• Set up auto-import file monitoring
• Customize tutorial preferences
• Adjust performance options

💡 Personalize PDF Utility to fit your workflow!

🎓 Learning & Help

Get help anytime through the menu bar:
• Tools → Tutorials: Restart any tutorial
• Help → Documentation: Detailed guides
• Help → About: Version and system info

💡 Never hesitate to explore and learn!
